title: session — tenancy + facility + coach hooks
description: Three hooks: tenant erasure orphan check, facility retirement cascade (auto-cancel sessions on retired facility), coach deactivation reassignment.

reference.hierarchy_note: See hierarchy.md §12 for tenancy-lifecycle vs domain-event separation.

hooks.purpose: Runs BEFORE tenancy's FK cascade. Verifies session_attendance rows are gone (they cascade via CASCADE FK on session_id). Session rows themselves cascade via tenant_id FK. Safeguarding-flagged sessions log a diagnostic before the cascade drops them (the audit_events survive).

Fires on FacilityRetired. Finds active sessions whose resource_booking.facility_id points at the retired facility. For each: transition Session.status -> cancelled with cancellation_reason='Facility retired' + trigger='facility_retired'. Fires SessionCancelled per session + the cannot-opt-out notification to registrants.

Fires when a Coach (Wave 2b) is deactivated. For every future active session where the coach is head_coach_id: null the head_coach_id + emit a diagnostic + fire SessionCoachReassigned. For sessions where the coach is in assistant_coach_ids: remove them from the array. Admin action required to appoint a new head coach (session cannot start without one for coach-required session_types).
